title: Updating a timeline column when a date is set
excerpt:
Hi. 
I’m looking for a timeline range to be automatically input based on a date column changing. 
Example date column is 22/05/25 then timeline column would then be 22/04/25 to 22/06/25 
Thanks

posts.author: SteveRickwood (Steven Rickwood )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.

I’m looking for a timeline range to be automatically input based on a date column changing.

Example date column is 22/05/25 then timeline column would then be 22/04/25 to 22/06/25

posts.author: Avo_FluidApps (Avo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @SteveRickwood - while this specific date offset isn’t something monday.com automates natively, our new Smart Timeline + Duration app does offer flexible automation once your start and end dates are set.

You might still find it super helpful for managing dates, statuses, reminders, and assignments – feel free to check it out or reach out if you’d like a walkthrough!
